descriptionHtml:
Adria Ketch 56 for Sale 1984 | 4 Cabins Version | Tax Paid

Engine Use 550 hours ONLY!!

We are pleased to present the Adria Ketch 56 for sale 1984, currently located in Liguria, Italy. This classic ketch, has undergone significant refitting and maintenance over recent years, making her a reliable and comfortable vessel for family cruising, charters, or extended journeys.

Maintenance and Refitting History

  • Two Volvo Penta D2-60 engines replaced with brand-new units (just 550 hours)
  • Hull repainted in blue
  • Rigging system fully replaced
  • Deck resurfaced with synthetic teak
  • Seacocks replaced

Further upgrades include a new bow thruster installed in 2023.

Interior Description
The accommodation aboard this Adria Ketch 56 for sale 1984 is spacious and practical:

  • Aft owner's cabin with twin beds and a central sofa
  • Two cabins with bunk beds
  • Quadruple bow cabin with four bunk beds
  • Large central saloon/hall
  • Central kitchen, appliances renovated in 2021
  • Two bathrooms in the stern area, one bathroom in the bow area

Equipment and Specifications

Construction & Dimensions

  • Year of construction: 1984
  • Hull length: 17.17 metres
  • Beam: 4.87 metres
  • Draft: 2.50 metres
  • Displacement: 18,000 kg
  • Hull, deck, and superstructure: VTR (fibreglass)

Engine and Mechanical

  • Engine: 2×60 HP Volvo Penta D2-60 (Installed new in 2021)
  • Engine hours: 550
  • Transmission: Shaft
  • Fuel: Diesel
  • Bow thruster: New 2023
  • Generator: Lombardini (overhauled 2019)
  • Stern warping winch

Tankage

  • Fuel: 1,000 litres
  • Water: 600 litres

Sails and Deck Gear

  • Sails replaced in 2019: Dacron battened mainsail, Dacron mizzen, Dacron Genoa and staysail (with anti-UV bands)
  • Lazybags for mainsail and mizzen
  • Furlex line furler (new 2021)
  • Sprayhood, cockpit cover, cream-coloured covers
  • Complete cockpit and deck cushions in cream colour
  • Tender: 2.80m (2022)
  • Outboard: Mercury 6hp (2020)

Electronics and Electrical

  • VHF
  • GPS
  • Radar
  • Echo sounder
  • Autopilot
  • Wind station
  • Battery charger (12 batteries)
  • Boiler: Electric and motor
  • Voltage: 12/24/220V

Certification

  • Italian flag
  • Certification expiration: 2026

Trade Options
Sail and motor exchanges are considered.

The boat currently requires some minor cosmetic work for renewing woodwork and attending to small areas of the interior decking, but overall she presents very well for her age.

If you are interested in the Adria Ketch 56 for sale 1984, please contact us for more information or to schedule a viewing.
